name: kl-hire-dashboard-root
description: Root runner for KL HIRE Dashboard, Video Bot, and ATS Parser

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix app" "npm run dev --prefix video-bot" "npm run start --prefix \"ATS - Data extract Open AI\""
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix app && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix video-bot && npm install --prefix \"ATS - Data extract Open AI\"
